title: docmend inventory (DR-001)
description: Output of `docmend scan` (FR-001, IR-001): a single JSON document recording the source root, the scan configuration in force, per-file classification records, symlink records (EC-008), skipped entries with reasons (ERR-007), shared-inode hard-link alias groups (EC-011), and aggregate counts that must reconcile with the per-file records. Hand-authored durable contract per adr-0005; the internal pydantic models conform to this file, never the reverse. Paths are POSIX-style and relative to source_root; the artifact stays on the operator's machine and is never committed (spec 13.4).

schema_version.description: MAJOR.MINOR, backward-only compatibility policy (adr-0005). MINOR adds optional fields or enum values; MAJOR changes meaning or removes fields.

generated_by.description: Tool identity and version, e.g. 'docmend 0.1.0' (mirrors the frontmatter output.generated_by convention, spec section 9).

requested_path.description: The PATH argument exactly as the user gave it — provenance for the single-file first-class flow (NFR-006).

source_root.description: Absolute path of the directory scanned. When requested_path is a single file this is its parent directory.

scan_config.description: The filter configuration the scan actually used, after CLI-flag overlay (OQ-029 replace semantics) — DR-001's 'scan configuration'. The full config snapshot belongs to the plan (DR-002), not the inventory.

files.description: One record per regular candidate file (matched include, not excluded, readable). Symlinks are never listed here.

symlinks.description: Symbolic links encountered inside the tree and not excluded (EC-008): recorded, never followed, never candidates for mutation in v1.

skipped.description: Files (or directories, for walk errors) deliberately not classified, with the reason (ERR-007). Files that simply do not match an include pattern are not candidates and are not recorded here.

hard_link_groups.description: Shared-inode alias groups for candidate files with st_nlink > 1 (EC-011). Plan processes each group once; apply skips-and-reports the alias set rather than mutating it.

relative_path.description: POSIX-style path relative to source_root; never absolute, never containing '..'.

suffix.description: Final extension including the dot, recorded verbatim as stored on disk ('.txt', '.TXT', ''); never normalized here, because rename decisions (FR-010) belong to the plan.

mtime_ns.description: st_mtime_ns at classification time — provenance for staleness reasoning; hashes, not mtimes, are the binding stale-input guard (FR-003).

newline_style.description: Line-ending census (EC-006): 'none' means the file contains no line terminators (including the zero-byte file, EC-009).

nul_bytes.description: True when any 0x00 byte is present — planning-layer input for the FR-015 risky classification and the OQ-026 utf16-suspect check.

non_ascii_bytes.description: Count of bytes >= 0x80 — the FR-007 non-ASCII floor gate's input fact (OQ-015), recorded for decision provenance (C.4).

bom.description: Byte-order mark sniffed from the first bytes; authoritative per FR-007 and evaluated before any NUL-byte classification (OQ-026).

utf8_valid.description: Whole file decodes as strict UTF-8 (FR-007 second rung).

ascii_only.description: non_ascii_bytes == 0 (FR-007 third rung: ASCII content is never detected as a legacy encoding).

detected.description: Detection verdict where one of the FR-007 rungs resolved it; null when only the charset-normalizer legacy rung (MS-2, FR-007) could decide.

confidence.description: 1.0 for the deterministic rungs; 1.0 minus CharsetMatch.chaos for charset-normalizer (OQ-015).

target.description: os.readlink result, verbatim (may be relative or point outside source_root — recorded, never resolved for mutation).

kind.description: What the link resolves to at scan time; 'broken' when the target does not exist.

reason.description: 'excluded': matched an include pattern but also an exclude pattern. 'unreadable': stat/open/read failed (ERR-007) — these count as findings for the section-18.5 exit-code taxonomy.

detail.description: Human-readable cause (e.g. the OS error); null for reasons that need none.

nlink.description: st_nlink of the inode; may exceed len(paths) when some aliases live outside the scanned tree.

paths.description: The in-scan member paths of the alias group, sorted.

totals.description: Aggregate counts; DR-001 requires each to reconcile exactly with the record arrays.
